Bosses

Boss sprites are assembled from the boss basicObjs parts used by the game client. HP is calculated from boss HP, linked ship HP, or the sum of destructible sprite-part HP when the boss is made from parts.

BossLevelHPXPSprite partsTurretsLootKinetic resEnergy resCorrosive res
???		1501,804,500,0008000091n/a000
Advectorian		766,902,613166824316Fusion Core000
Chelonidron		2810,350,001800028Flame Trail 25%02525
Dominator		1030,000100018Artifact 100%550
Executor		110140,081,6001000002416Radiated Junk10010090
Huge Mysterious Chest		1252,000,000,0001500010Gold Crate Event757575
Mandrom		18161,1665000527Artifact 100%15010
Mother Brain		564,100,00410000334Fusion Core0025
Mysterious Chest		458,000,000500010Artifact 100%505050
Rotator		22133,0034000810Toxic Waste15100
Tefat		321,80030019Crate Lightning Gun050
The Cleaner		8232,278,05218000213Artifact 100%33066
Three Emperors		1605,000,30010000010Phase Crystal505050

Want to improve this wiki? Contributions are welcome on github.com/guedesite/astroflux-wiki.
